body:
1 design issue found in the public API surface of `@azure/arm-alertsmanagement` (v1.0.0-beta.1, API `2025-05-25-preview`).

**Tooling checks:** Versions are consistent across `package.json`, `alertsManagementContext.ts`, and `CHANGELOG.md` (all `1.0.0-beta.1`). `apiRefLink` correctly uses `?view=azure-node-preview` for a beta release. No alpha versions detected. CI checks passing.

**API surface:** One naming violation — `ProxyResource_1` with a `_N` suffix indicating a model naming collision in the TypeSpec spec. This needs to be resolved on the spec side.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37870,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/alertsmanagement/arm-alertsmanagement/review/arm-alertsmanagement-node.api.md","line":618,"issueType":"design","category":"naming","description":"ProxyResource_1 _N suffix indicates a naming collision between two ProxyResource models in the TypeSpec spec; AlertModification and AlertsSummary extend the unnamed variant. Suggest using @clientName to rename one or merging the models in the spec repo."}]}
```

</details>
